major_v3_fixes: Added L-R332 and L-R348 lead radials.
Added smooth DME ARC exit turns to RDL340.
Added RDL340 / 160° final common segment semantics.
Added radial reference geometry for RDL016/114/236/275/295/340.
Added VJB Morse code and VJB VOR/DME REQUIRED equipment constraint.
properties.dme_arc_meaning: Aircraft maintains constant 11 NM DME distance from VJB VOR/DME.

properties.chart_title: STANDARD ARRIVAL CHART INSTRUMENT (STAR)-ICAO / ARRIVAL (11 DME ARC) RWY 16
properties.v3_change: Added lead radials, exit smooth turns, radial references, final common segment semantics, chart metadata, VJB Morse.
